tutorial.battle.text.1: Let's walk you through your first battle.
tutorial.battle.text.2: The icons above units in battle are called card slots.
tutorial.battle.text.3: Empty card slots appear gray, while filled card slots appear black.
tutorial.battle.text.4:
The number inside each card slot is its speed.
Speed determines the order in which assigned cards are played during combat.
Each card slot's speed is randomly determined at turn start based on the unit's speed range.
tutorial.battle.text.5: Click on the card slot above your unit to select it.
tutorial.battle.text.6: When a slot is selected, its unit’s hand appears below.
tutorial.battle.text.7: Click on a card in the unit's hand to select it.
tutorial.battle.text.8:
Cards cost a resource called 'MP' (Mana Points) to play.
You can view each unit's available MP to the right of their health value, displayed in blue.
tutorial.battle.text.9:
To queue the selected card for play, you must select a valid target.
Click the enemy’s card slot to select it as this slot’s target.
tutorial.battle.text.10:
Notice how the card slot's background color changed.
You can hover over any filled card slot to view its assigned card.
tutorial.battle.text.11: If you wish to cancel your selection, right-click the filled card slot to unassign its card.
tutorial.battle.text.12: Turns are divided into two phases: the assignment phase and the combat phase.
tutorial.battle.text.13: During the assignment phase, you can assign cards to card slots and determine your turn order.
tutorial.battle.text.14: When you're ready, press either the End Turn button at the top of the HUD or the spacebar key to switch to the combat phase.
tutorial.battle.text.15: During the combat phase, cards are played in order based on their assigned slot's speed — from highest to lowest.
tutorial.battle.text.16: If two or more slots share the same speed, one is chosen randomly to play first.
tutorial.battle.text.17: Cards then activate, triggering their effects such as dealing damage or causing various effects.
tutorial.battle.text.18: Let's finish this fight! Use what you've learned to defeat the enemy.
tutorial.battle.text.20: You can replay this tutorial from the main menu or check the in-game manual for more details not covered here.
tutorial.battle.text.21: Good luck on your descent into the abyss!
